name: Nigeria
intro: Nigeria's project demand runs ahead of its certified supply. Banks in Lagos push aggressive digital agendas, the oil and gas industry executes capital projects under joint-venture governance that requires qualified staff, telecoms build out data infrastructure, and a startup ecosystem that has produced multiple unicorns hires delivery talent constantly. A PMP or CSM in Nigeria differentiates immediately — locally, and for the remote and international roles many Nigerian professionals pursue. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule, landing at comfortable morning-to-early-evening hours in Nigeria. Instruction is in English with an international cohort, and invoices work for employer sponsorship. After the workshop we support your exam application step by step, run realistic mock exams, and stay reachable for doubts until you certify.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in Nigeria?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in Nigeria?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across Nigeria.
